title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY JUBAS, MUNICIPALITY OF LIBAGON, PROVINCE OF SOUTHERN LEYTE TO BE KNOWN AS LIBAGON NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
H. No. 4853 ; Manila Bulletin (January 7, 2016); 112 OG No. 7, 744 (February 15, 2016)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10731, December 29, 2015 ]

AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY JUBAS, MUNICIPALITY OF LIBAGON, PROVINCE OF SOUTHERN LEYTE TO BE KNOWN AS LIBAGON NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. There is hereby established, under the supervision of the Department of Education, a national high school in Barangay Jubas, Municipality of Libagon, Province of Southern Leyte to be known as Libagon National High School.

SEC. 2. The Secretary of Education shall immediately include in the Departmentâs program the operationalization of the Libagon National High School, the funding of which shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 3. The Secretary of Education shall issue the rules and regulations necessary to carry out the purpose of this Act.

SEC. 3. The Secretary of Education shall issue the rules and regulations necessary to carry out the purpose of this Act.

SEC. 4. This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette

or in a newspaper of general circulation.

Approved,

(Sgd.)

FRANKLIN M. DRILON

President of the Senate

(Sgd.)

FELICIANO BELMONTE JR.

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on October 20, 2014 and October 5, 2015, respectively.

(Sgd.)

OSCAR G. YABES

Secretary of the Senate

(Sgd.)

MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: DEC 29 2015

(Sgd.)

BENIGNO S. AQUINO III

President of the Philippines
